Men's Basketball 2025 River City Holiday Classic Roster Schedule Statistics Additional Links

2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

4 Jacobi Sebock

  • Position Forward
  • Height 6-7
  • Weight 200
  • Class Senior
  • Hometown Midwest City, Okla.
  • Highschool Midwest City
  • Bio
  • Stats
  • Historical

Biography

Junior transfer guard with big athletic ability ready to help the Bronchos right away this winter … Scoring guard that can shoot from all over the floor and possesses a knack for driving dunks … Active on the defensive end … Brings veteran experience and depth to the lineup … Transferred to UCO from Queens (N.C.) after spending freshman year at Dodge City Community College in Kansas.
 
2023-2024: Appeared in 28 games, including five starts, in sophomore season at Queens … Averaged 16.0 minutes per game and put up 5.2 points, 4.2 rebounds, and 0.4 assists per game … Reached double figure scoring in six contests … Recorded a double-double with 14 points and 11 rebounds against North Alabama in January.

JUCO: Spent one season at Dodge City in 2022-23 ... Led team to a 25-10 overall record while winning the KJCCC Conference Championship and making an Elite Eight appearance in the NJCAA Division 1 national tournament ... Played in all 34 games, including 33 starts and averaged 11.2 points, 8.0 rebounds, 1.3 steals, and 1.1 assists per game … Named KJCCC Second Team All-Conference.
 
High School: Played high school basketball at Midwest City where he led the Bombers to a regional championship and a state tournament appearance in 2021-22 ... Averaged 16.0 points and 7.0 rebounds per game during senior campaign ... Named Big 8 Conference Player of the Year, Big 8 First Team All-Conference, and an All-State selection.
 
Personal: Physical Education major … Names the Chicago Bulls his favorite team and Blindside as his favorite sports movie … Plays through medical condition hypohidrotic ectodermal dysplasia (HED), which prevents him sweating … Birthdate is Aug. 3, 2003.
